div.p: Specification: Statistical Validity Check (ISO/IEC 25010) Implementation Type: Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA)

g.title: Entry Point: Reset registers and flush CPU cache
Constraint: No context switches allowed during timed loop
Complexity: O(N log N) for sort + O(N) for variance
